Bash(export PATH="/tmp/claude-1000/mamba/envs/renv/bin:/usr/bin:/usr/sbin:/bin:/sbin:$PATH" TMPDIR=/tmp/claude-1000 R_LIBS_SITE="/tmp/claude-1000/mamba/envs/renv/lib/R/library" R_LIBS_USER="/tmp/claude-1000/rlibs" && mkdir -p /tmp/claude-1000/bioc_cache && Rscript -e '
Sys.setenv\(XDG_CACHE_HOME = "/tmp/claude-1000/bioc_cache"\)
library\(JASPAR2024\)
library\(TFBSTools\)
db <- JASPAR2024\(\)
cat\("DB class:", class\(db\), "\\n"\)
opts <- list\(collection = "CORE", tax_group = "metazoa", all_versions = FALSE\)
pfms <- getMatrixSet\(db, opts\)
cat\("Motifs loaded:", length\(pfms\), "\\n"\)
' 2>&1)

Bash(export PATH="/tmp/claude-1000/mamba/envs/renv/bin:/usr/bin:/usr/sbin:/bin:/sbin:$PATH" TMPDIR=/tmp/claude-1000 R_LIBS_SITE="/tmp/claude-1000/mamba/envs/renv/lib/R/library" R_LIBS_USER="/tmp/claude-1000/rlibs" && Rscript -e '
Sys.setenv\(XDG_CACHE_HOME = "/tmp/claude-1000/bioc_cache"\)
library\(JASPAR2024\)
library\(TFBSTools\)
db <- JASPAR2024\(\)
# Try to find the sqlite path
cat\("Slots:", slotNames\(db\), "\\n"\)
# Try direct sqlite path
sqlite_path <- find.files <- list.files\("/tmp/claude-1000/bioc_cache", pattern="JASPAR.*sqlite", recursive=TRUE, full.names=TRUE\)
cat\("SQLite files:", sqlite_path, "\\n"\)
' 2>&1)
